name: Load Capacity
description: Maximum rated load the elevator can carry.

name: Rated Speed
description: Nominal travel speed of the car.

name: Door Opening Type
description: Mechanism and direction of automatic door opening.

name: Cabin Wall Finish
description: Surface material applied to interior cabin walls.

name: Number of Stops
description: Total number of floor landings served.

name: Load Capacity
description: Maximum rated load the elevator can carry.

name: Rated Speed
description: Nominal travel speed of the car.

name: Door Opening Type
description: Mechanism and direction of automatic door opening.

name: Cabin Wall Finish
description: Surface material applied to interior cabin walls.

name: Number of Stops
description: Total number of floor landings served.

name: Destination Control
description: Call and dispatch logic: conventional vs destination dispatch system.

name: Energy Recovery Mode
description: Drive type and energy recapture capability during descent braking.

name: Group Control Logic
description: Single elevator vs grouped multi-car dispatching logic.

name: Regulatory Certification
description: Applicable safety standard or zone classification for installation environment.

name: Drive Motor Rating
description: Rated motor power output for the main traction drive.

name: Corrosion Protection Grade
description: Atmospheric corrosion resistance class per ISO 12944 / EN 13480.

name: Shaft Construction Type
description: Type of shaft structure enclosing the elevator travel path.

name: Installation Inclination
description: Angular deviation from vertical for inclined or mine installations.

name: Vibration Isolation Class
description: Type of isolation mounts between structure and drive machinery.

name: Fire Evacuation Mode
description: Fire service operation phase programming per EN 81-73.

name: Structural Load Class
description: Maximum design payload for heavy cargo or industrial applications.

name: Door Impact Protection
description: Mechanical robustness rating of the landing and car door panels.

name: Remote Monitoring Interface
description: Connectivity method for off-site lift status and fault monitoring.

name: Number of Stops
description: Total number of floor landings served.
